title: XYKey
description: A mod that lets you easily share coordinates
body:
# XYKey
A mod that adds keybinds that make it easier to manage coordinates

Features:
- Send your position to chat
- Show your position on screen
- Send your position to chat with a name (e.g. ``Home: 105 64 -90``)
- Copy your position to clipboard
- Save position to view it later

[![Join my Discord server](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/797542612470333441/widget.png?style=banner4 "My Discord server")](https://discord.com/invite/z2KEpz7Ytd)
